# Knowledge Graphs

Knowledge graphs help reveal clusters, bridges, and dead ends in a note collection.

down:: [[Projects/Scrymap Demo]]
cite:: [[References/Force Graph]]
[[People/Ada Lovelace]]

Try filtering the graph to focus on areas and references from this note.

nodes.name: Home
nodes.content:
---
summary: Starter map for the included sample vault.
tags:
  - demo
  - home
---

# Home

This sample vault is intentionally small, but it shows the main Scrymap features:

- wikilinks and tagged wikilinks
- vault-defined node types and colors
- frontmatter lists and link fields in the note viewer

down:: [[Projects/Scrymap Demo]]
down:: [[Areas/Knowledge Graphs]]
cite:: [[References/Force Graph]]
inspired-by:: [[People/Ada Lovelace]]

Use the graph to jump into [[Projects/Scrymap Demo|the demo project note]].

# Scrymap Demo

This note acts like a project hub inside the sample vault.

It pulls together ideas from [[Areas/Knowledge Graphs]], cites [[References/Force Graph]], and is inspired-by:: [[People/Ada Lovelace]].

The frontmatter above is useful for testing the inline viewer:

- `tags` is a YAML list
- `links` is a YAML list of URLs
- `url` is a single URL field

# Force Graph

`force-graph` provides the interactive graph rendering used by Scrymap.

It is cited by [[Projects/Scrymap Demo]] and connected to [[Areas/Knowledge Graphs]].
